title: Organic Management Approaches and Practices to Support Sustainable Horticultural and Fruit Plants Production
summary: This paper highlights agroecological approaches to reduce reliance on chemical inputs for safe and sustainable horticultural production.

title: Evaluating the Path to the European Commission's Organic Agriculture Goal: A Multivariate Analysis of Changes in EU Countries
summary: A comprehensive evaluation of the socio-economic relationships and changes driving the European Commission's organic agriculture goals between 2004 and 2021.

title: The Effect of Crop Production Systems and Cultivars on Spring Wheat Yield in a Long-Term Experiment
summary: The research determines the impact of organic, integrated, and conventional crop production systems on the yield of spring wheat.

title: Impact of Food Supermarket Opening Hours on Small and Medium Agri-Food Producers
summary: This research investigates how the dominant market position and opening hours of large retail chains affect consumer shopping habits and small-scale food producers.

title: Dynamics of Energy Fluxes in a Mediterranean Vineyard: Influence of Soil Moisture
summary: This study focuses on optimizing water management in Mediterranean climates by evaluating sensible and latent energy fluxes at the canopy and soil levels.

title: Two-Stage Multimodal Method for Predicting Intramuscular Fat in Pigs
summary: Addressing the need for non-destructive meat quality assessment, this research utilizes ultrasound imaging and segmentation networks to predict fat content.

title: The Role of Digital Finance in Shaping Agricultural Economic Resilience: Evidence from Machine Learning
summary: This paper analyzes how digital finance affects agricultural economic resilience using machine learning methodologies.

title: The state of agricultural extension services in Sri Lanka, 2024-2025
summary: A detailed project paper exploring the current landscape and operational efficiency of agricultural extension services in Sri Lanka.

title: Development Status and Key Technologies of Plant Protection UAVs in China: A Review
summary: A review of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) utilized for crop protection, focusing on recent technological advancements in China.

title: Dynamic Quantification and Prediction of Salt Tolerance Threshold in Summer Maize Under Different Regimes of Brackish Water Irrigation
summary: This study elucidates the dynamic nature of salt tolerance in summer maize and provides a scientific basis for optimizing brackish water irrigation.

title: Precision agriculture for improving crop yield predictions: a literature review
summary: A literature review highlighting key gaps and opportunities for remote sensing and machine learning techniques in predicting crop yields.

title: Opportunities and Barriers to Develop Interactive Digital Extension Services for Smallholder Farmers
summary: This study uses a systematic review method to explore the implementation of interactive digital extension services in developing countries.

title: Phytostimulator Application after Cold Stress for Better Maize (Zea mays L.) Plant Recovery
summary: Research exploring the application of phytostimulators to enhance the recovery of maize plants following periods of cold stress.

title: Organic Farming: Scope and Potential in North Eastern Hill Region of India
summary: This chapter examines the potential of organic farming in the North Eastern Region of India, highlighting its biodiversity and agro-climatic conditions.

title: Future ecosystem service provision under land-use change scenarios in southwestern Ethiopia
summary: An analysis of how intensive land conversion and agricultural expansion threaten terrestrial habitats and biological diversity in Ethiopia.

title: The Impact of Livelihood Capital on Farmers' Willingness to Participate in Wildlife Conservation
summary: Evidence gathered from farming communities around the Jiyuan Macaque Nature Reserve regarding their participation in conservation efforts.

title: The Effect of Awareness of Renewable Energy Resources on Sustainable Production in Dairy Farming
summary: A case study from Konya Province, Turkey, detailing how renewable energy awareness translates to sustainable dairy production.

title: Determinants and risk mitigation in livestock management practices among smallholder farmers in the Eastern Cape Province of South Africa
summary: An examination of risk mitigation strategies deployed by smallholder livestock farmers facing local environmental challenges.

title: The Key Role of Cooperatives in Sustainable Agriculture and Agrifood Security: Evidence from Greece
summary: A look into how agricultural cooperatives are securing agrifood pipelines and promoting sustainability within the Greek economy.

title: Exploring the potential of decentralized extension models on the sustainability of livelihoods: a food security lens on aquaculture farmers in Bangladesh
summary: A study investigating how decentralized extension networks improve the food security and sustainability of aquaculture operations in Bangladesh.

title: Global Trends in Agricultural Extension Research A Bibliometric Analysis Using Scopus Database
summary: A comprehensive bibliometric review of global trends in agricultural extension services, identifying themes like ICT-enabled extensions and climate resilience.

title: Diversification of Agricultural Output Intensity across the European Union in Light of the Assumptions of Sustainable Development
summary: An analysis of the diversification required across the EU to harmonize food security with long-term environmental stewardship.

title: Utilizing Information and Communication Technology (ICT) to grant farmers direct access to information
summary: A bibliometric analysis covering ICT-based extension and advisory services (EAS) to understand technology integration in modern agriculture.

title: Digital innovation in agriculture has become a powerful force in the modern world
summary: This study examines the effects of digital technology on key agricultural performance metrics, including agricultural output and real labor productivity.

title: Exploring the scope of ecosystem services in diverse farming systems for sustainable agriculture: A review
summary: A broad review emphasizing that ecosystem services are fundamental to promoting agricultural sustainability and enhancing resilience.

title: Adoption of digital platforms for marketing of agricultural produce by farmers in Bihar
summary: Research evaluating the digital marketing shift and adoption rates among farmers managing their agricultural produce sales in India.

title: Mediating role of the regulatory framework in board accountability and sustainable growth of agricultural marketing co-operative societies in Simiyu, Tanzania
summary: This study examines how regulatory frameworks mediate the relationship between board accountability and the growth of agricultural co-operatives.

title: Value Chain Analysis of Sesame Production and Marketing Among Smallholder Farmers in Magwi County, South Sudan
summary: An analysis reviewing current methods of sesame production and proposing solutions to resolve production and marketing challenges for smallholders.

title: Innovations in the agricultural insurance market: a systematic literature review
summary: A systematic review focusing on how new technologies improve pricing, risk analysis, and distribution in the agricultural insurance sector.

title: Effect of organic farming on the number of ASVs in the soil microbial communities
summary: This study demonstrates that organic farming enhances the functional roles of microorganisms in nutrient cycling by boosting soil organic carbon content.

title: Digital Agriculture Transforming Extension Services
summary: An overview of how digital agriculture extension services can effectively empower farmers and support infrastructure development.
